# PERF-020 positive: reflect.ValueOf in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-020-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"reflect"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Echo(c *gin.Context) {
	body := map[string]any{"ok": true}
	v := reflect.ValueOf(body)
	_ = v
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, body)
}
